meta.title: Studio expansion recipe additions
meta.note: These are additional workshop-facing formulas to expand the research set. They are intended for controlled testing and branch development, not blind production use.

recipes.name: SX Low-Fire Zinc-Free Clear Host
notes: Low-fire clear host branch for stain and underglaze testing where zinc influence is intentionally minimized.

recipes.name: SX Low-Fire Majolica Bright White
notes: Opaque low-fire majolica base tuned for brush decoration under a white field.

recipes.name: SX Low-Fire Turquoise Clear
notes: Copper turquoise branch built on a low-fire clear host for controlled color testing.

recipes.name: SX Low-Fire Soft Crackle Clear
notes: High-expansion low-fire crackle branch for decorative and stain-wash effects.

recipes.name: SX Cone-6 Liner Zinc-Free
notes: Stable cone-6 liner branch for general host testing without zinc-specific shifts.

recipes.name: SX Cone-6 Warm Host Clear
notes: Warm-color host clear branch used for pink, maroon, and warm stain comparison panels.

recipes.name: SX Cone-6 Porcelain Fit Clear
notes: Lower-expansion clear branch intended for tight porcelain fit conditions.

recipes.name: SX Cone-6 Silky Functional Matte
notes: Silky matte branch aimed at smoother functional surfaces than rough dry-matte families.

recipes.name: SX Cone-6 Light Celadon
notes: Light celadon branch tuned for clean green pooling on white bodies.

recipes.name: SX Cone-6 Floating Blue Soft
notes: Softer floating-blue branch with lower cobalt than highly saturated versions.

recipes.name: SX Cone-6 Iron Rust Break
notes: Iron-rust branch for schedule and thickness testing around cone-6 iron-red behavior.

recipes.name: SX Cone-6 Alberta Honey
notes: Warm transparent amber branch for natural-base family testing.

recipes.name: SX Cone-6 Black Satin
notes: Satin black branch built from a stable matte host and stain route.

recipes.name: SX Cone-6 Turquoise Fluid
notes: Fluid cone-6 copper branch for movement and pooling comparisons against stable hosts.

recipes.name: SX Cone-10 Gloss Liner
notes: High-fire transparent liner branch for cone-10 functional testing.

recipes.name: SX Cone-10 Clean Celadon
notes: High-fire celadon direction from a clean transparent host with low iron loading.

recipes.name: SX Cone-10 Silky Dolomite
notes: Silky dolomite matte branch for cone-10 reduction matte comparisons.

recipes.name: SX Cone-10 Deep Temmoku
notes: High-iron glossy branch for deep temmoku-style black-brown with warm breaks.

recipes.name: SX Cone-10 Ash Cream
notes: Soft ash-cream branch for high-fire atmospheric and reduction variations.

recipes.name: SX Cone-10 Shino Warm Break
notes: Warm shino branch for reduction break and carbon-sensitive surface exploration.

recipes.name: SX Raku Turquoise Soft
notes: Copper-cobalt turquoise raku branch with controlled crackle and soft metallic response.

recipes.name: SX Raku Metallic Black
notes: Dark metallic raku branch for black-copper variation and reduction pattern testing.

recipes.name: SX Raku White Crackle Base
notes: White crackle raku base for smoke and post-reduction contrast effects.

recipes.name: SX2 Low-Fire Super Clear 03
notes: Low-fire clear branch for cone-03 maturity and strong transparent coverage.

recipes.name: SX2 Low-Fire Matte White Liner
notes: Low-fire matte white branch for decorative-liner style testing.

recipes.name: SX2 Low-Fire Mint Crackle
notes: Decorative mint crackle branch for low-fire overlap and stain-wash work.

recipes.name: SX2 Low-Fire Amber Honey
notes: Transparent amber branch for low-fire honey and tea-wash effects.

recipes.name: SX2 Low-Fire Underglaze Cover Clear
notes: Cover-clear branch intended for painted underglaze preservation and gloss control.

recipes.name: SX2 Cone-6 Utility Clear
notes: General-purpose cone-6 clear for workflow baseline comparisons.

recipes.name: SX2 Cone-6 Zinc-Free Host
notes: Clear host branch aimed at sensitive stain and warm-color systems.

recipes.name: SX2 Cone-6 Cream Satin Calcium
notes: Calcium-satin branch for matte contrast against magnesia-dominant matte families.

recipes.name: SX2 Cone-6 Speckled Iron
notes: Iron-rutile branch for speckled and broken mid-fire surfaces.

recipes.name: SX2 Cone-6 Copper Green Satin
notes: Copper-rutile satin branch tuned for softer green breaks on cone-6 bodies.

recipes.name: SX2 Cone-6 Blue Break Rutile
notes: Floating-blue adjacent branch with a slightly lower cobalt loading for softer transitions.

recipes.name: SX2 Cone-6 Opaque White Gloss
notes: Opaque white gloss branch for under-decoration and contrast surfaces.

recipes.name: SX2 Cone-6 Clear Crackle Soft
notes: High-expansion cone-6 clear crackle branch for decorative line and wash work.

recipes.name: SX2 Cone-10 Porcelain Clear
notes: High-fire clear branch oriented toward porcelain clarity and liner use.

recipes.name: SX2 Cone-10 Soft Celadon
notes: Soft high-fire celadon branch for reduction pools and transparent depth.

recipes.name: SX2 Cone-10 Bamboo Matte
notes: Bamboo-tone matte branch for rutile warmth over silky reduction matte chemistry.

recipes.name: SX2 Cone-10 Iron Saturate
notes: Iron-saturated high-fire branch for deep black-brown pools and red-brown breaks.

recipes.name: SX2 Cone-10 Ash Runny
notes: Fluid ash branch for vertical movement and atmospheric break testing.

recipes.name: SX2 Cone-10 Satin White Zircon
notes: Satin white branch using zircon opacity on a high-fire matte-friendly base.

recipes.name: SX2 Raku Copper Red Soft
notes: Soft copper-red raku branch for reduction-time comparisons.

recipes.name: SX2 Raku Jade Green
notes: Jade-shift raku branch for copper-cobalt balance testing.

recipes.name: SX2 Raku Oilspot Metallic
notes: Metallic oilspot-style raku branch for smoke and reduction pattern work.

recipes.name: SX2 Raku Smoke Black Matte
notes: Smoke-black matte branch for dark reduction and carbon trap outcomes.

recipes.name: SX3 Low-Fire Clear Brushable
notes: Brushable low-fire clear branch for decorated ware and underglaze cover tests.

recipes.name: SX3 Low-Fire Opaque Ivory
notes: Ivory-white opaque branch for majolica and painted low-fire work.

recipes.name: SX3 Low-Fire Cobalt Blue Gloss
notes: Low-fire cobalt gloss branch for saturated blue and underglaze-overlap comparisons.

recipes.name: SX3 Low-Fire Copper Green Flow
notes: Fluid copper-green branch for vertical movement and pooling tests at low fire.

recipes.name: SX3 Cone-6 Clear Porcelain Low Expansion
notes: Porcelain-fit clear branch for lower-expansion cone-6 bodies.

recipes.name: SX3 Cone-6 Stable Matte Liner
notes: Matte-liner branch balancing silky feel and stability for functional tests.

recipes.name: SX3 Cone-6 Copper Turquoise Gloss
notes: Fluid copper-turquoise gloss branch for cone-6 movement and color depth.

recipes.name: SX3 Cone-6 Black Gloss Stain
notes: Black gloss branch using stain-host strategy on a stable clear chemistry.

recipes.name: SX3 Cone-6 Satin Lithium Brown
notes: Lithium-rutile Alberta branch for satin brown movement and pooling.

recipes.name: SX3 Cone-10 Feldspathic Clear
notes: Feldspathic clear branch for high-fire host and liner comparison.

recipes.name: SX3 Cone-10 Temmoku Classic
notes: Classic temmoku branch for deep black-brown transparent iron glass.

recipes.name: SX3 Cone-10 Shino Orange Break
notes: Shino orange-break branch for reduction carbon and warm break development.

recipes.name: SX3 Cone-10 White Opacified Satin
notes: Satin white branch using tin opacity for warmer high-fire white surfaces.

recipes.name: SX3 Raku Copper Lustre Soft
notes: Softer copper-lustre raku branch for reduced metallic wash.

recipes.name: SX3 Raku Red Metallic Strong
notes: Stronger metallic-red branch for reduction-time sensitivity tests.
